Settings.languageDescription: Choose the language used in this browser.
Settings.githubDescription: The owner connection determines which repositories are available and where Sketchblock can save.
Settings.collabDescription: The server and database are configured through the runtime environment. Sketchblock reads protected database diagnostics through the collaboration server.
Settings.demoDescription: Restore the example board to its original state. Sessions remain separate and can be ended from Collaboration.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Open boards, see collaboration, and continue where work happens.

repositories.title: Repository
repositories.subtitle: Connect GitHub and choose where your Sketchblock boards live.

drawings.title: Boards
drawings.subtitle: Open, search, and share visual artifacts from the active repository.

sessions.title: Collaboration
sessions.subtitle: Start a live session, share roles, and follow active work.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage local accounts, roles, and access to this Sketchblock instance.

system.title: System status
system.subtitle: Monitor services and trace product activity.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure connections and storage rules for the workspace.

editor.title: Edit board
editor.subtitle: Work on the canvas and save the final state to GitHub.

Auth.passwordHint: At least 12 characters. Use a unique, long password.
Auth.usernameHint: 3–64 characters: letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, or underscores.
Auth.setupCodeHint: Enter the one-time code from the server log or server configuration.
Auth.newPasswordMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
Auth.passwordChangeFailed: The password could not be changed.
Auth.unavailable: Sketchblock is currently unavailable. Please try again.
Auth.heroTitle: Sketch together. Keep moving with confidence.
Auth.heroDescription: Sketchblock connects collaborative Excalidraw boards with a clear workflow and GitHub versioning.
Auth.editorAlt: Sketchblock editor with a collaboratively edited diagram
Auth.editorCaption: Collaborative work on a visual board in the Sketchblock editor.
Auth.participantDescription: GitHub confirms your identity. You will then enter the invited board directly.
Auth.ownerDescription: Sign in with your local account. You can then use your GitHub connection, boards, and sessions.
Auth.inviteRoleDescription: Your personal link determines whether you can collaborate or view the board.
Auth.localAccessDescription: Configure GitHub separately in the back office for repository access and saving.
Auth.setupHeroTitle: Get Sketchblock ready for your team.
Auth.setupHeroDescription: Create the local owner account once. Then connect GitHub and open your first board.
Auth.secureFirstStartDescription: The code becomes invalid after setup. You define your own password.
Auth.generatedTokenDescription: Enter the one-time setup code from the server log. Then choose a username and a password with at least twelve characters.
Auth.configuredTokenAfter: Then choose a username and a password with at least twelve characters.
Auth.setupCodeTooShortAfter: to at least {minimumLength} characters and restart Sketchblock. Without the variable, Sketchblock generates a one-time code in the server log on the next start.
Auth.passwordStorage: Sketchblock stores your password only as a secure hash. The owner account remains local to this instance.
Auth.githubOauthFailed: GitHub sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
Auth.githubOauthUnavailable: GitHub OAuth is currently unavailable. Check the local configuration and try again.
Auth.repositoryPermission: Your GitHub account does not have sufficient access to the configured repository.

Common.replaceStartPassword: Replace the one-time start password before opening the workspace.
Common.startPasswordRevoked: Your start password becomes invalid after the change. All previous sign-in sessions are revoked.

System.loadStatusFailed: System status could not be loaded.
System.loadAuditFailed: Activity log could not be loaded.
System.loadFailed: System data could not be loaded.
System.stateDescription: Availability, versions, and core metrics of the running instance.
System.activityDescription: Who performed which product action and when.

Users.description: Accounts, roles, and access for this Sketchblock instance.
Users.createDescription: Sketchblock generates a start password that is shown exactly once.
Users.displayNameHint: Optional name for the interface and activity log.
Users.passwordDescription: This password will not be shown again after closing. The user must change it at first sign-in.

RepositoryPicker.loadFailed: GitHub repositories could not be loaded.
RepositoryPicker.selectFailed: The repository could not be selected.
RepositoryPicker.title: Add GitHub repository
RepositoryPicker.description: Repositories where your GitHub account may save changes are shown.
RepositoryPicker.allConnected: All available repositories are already connected.

Share.title: Invite to live session
Share.description: Share the appropriate link or scan the QR code directly from the screen.
Share.collaboratorDescription: Can edit the board during this session.
Share.copyFailed: The link could not be copied.

Boards.description: Your visual workspaces in the active repository. Live boards are shown first.
Boards.scanHint: Scan your repository to show Excalidraw boards as previews.
Boards.extensionHint: Sketchblock detects files with the .excalidraw extension.
Boards.allHint: Find the complete view under All boards.

Editor.ownerLiveHint: Changes are synchronized with the live session. The owner remains responsible for saving to GitHub.
Editor.ownerLocalHint: Your changes remain local until you save them to GitHub.
Editor.viewerHint: Viewer session: This board is read-only.
Editor.collaboratorHint: Collaborator session: The owner saves the final state to GitHub.

Join.ownerDescription: Control the board, see connected people, and save the final state to GitHub.
Join.viewerDescription: View the board and its current state without making changes.
Join.collaboratorDescription: Work on the board together; the owner saves the final state to GitHub.
Join.sessionDataUnavailable: Session data is currently unavailable. Try again or ask the owner for the current status.

Workspace.connectRepository: Connect GitHub and choose a repository to set up Sketchblock.
Workspace.loadFailed: The workspace could not be loaded completely. Check the connection and try again.
Workspace.boardOpenFailed: The board could not be opened.
Workspace.boardSaveFailed: The board could not be saved.
Workspace.boardStale: The state on GitHub has changed. Reload the board before saving.
Workspace.boardDirty: Local changes have not been saved yet.
Workspace.boardSavedCommit: Saved and pushed to GitHub · Commit {commit}.
Workspace.repositoryScanFailed: The repository could not be scanned.
Workspace.repositoryEmpty: Repository {repository} was selected but does not contain an .excalidraw file yet.
Workspace.repositorySwitchConfirm: Switching repositories discards local unsaved changes. Switch anyway?
Workspace.repositoryActivateFailed: The repository could not be activated.
Workspace.repositoryDisconnectFailed: The repository could not be disconnected.
Workspace.sessionStartFailed: The session could not be started.
Workspace.sessionDeleteConfirm: Delete this session? The local record will be removed and the collaboration server will be notified.
Workspace.sessionDeleteFailed: The session could not be deleted.
Workspace.sessionStatusFailed: The session status could not be changed.
Workspace.demoDescription: Try boards and live collaboration locally. Configure GitHub when you are ready to use your own repositories.
Workspace.peopleWorking: {count} people are working on this board. Open the canvas and join them.
Workspace.openFirstBoard: Open the first available board and continue working on the canvas.
Workspace.scanMakesVisible: The next scan will make existing .excalidraw files visible as boards.
Workspace.connectGitHubDescription: Sketchblock gets access to repositories where you may save changes.
Workspace.chooseRepositoryDescription: Choose the repository that serves as the source of truth for your boards.
Workspace.openFirstDescription: The scan finds .excalidraw files and makes them editable in the browser.
Workspace.onboardingTitle: Connect your visual artifacts with Git.
Workspace.onboardingDescription: Three steps create a workspace where Excalidraw boards can be edited collaboratively and saved back to GitHub in a controlled way.
Workspace.startLiveDescription: Choose a board and open a room for collaborative work.
Workspace.scanBoardFirst: Scan a repository with at least one board first.
Workspace.endSessionDescription: All connected participants will lose live access to “{board}”.
Workspace.earlierDescription: Recently closed rooms for this repository selection.
Workspace.noEvents: No events have been recorded for this session yet.
Workspace.chooseBoardDescription: Open the board gallery and start the editor from the appropriate preview.
Workspace.boardLoadFailed: The board could not be loaded
Workspace.checkConnection: Check the connection and try again.
Workspace.scanRepositoryFailed: The repository could not be scanned.
Workspace.connectedRepositoriesDescription: One repository is globally active. Switching updates boards, sessions, and the save target.
Workspace.boardRepositoryDescription: Sketchblock reads and saves boards directly in this repository.
Workspace.emptyRepositoryHint: This repository does not contain an .excalidraw file yet. Add a board to the repository and scan again.
Workspace.selectWritableRepository: Choose a repository with write access. Sketchblock will then scan it automatically for Excalidraw boards.
Workspace.boardsFound: {count, plural, one {# board was} other {# boards were}} found during the latest scan.
Workspace.connectThenChoose: Connect GitHub, then choose the appropriate workspace.
Workspace.boardEmptyDescription: When the repository scan finds an .excalidraw file, it will appear here as a visual preview.
Workspace.boardsCount: {visible} of {total} boards in the active repository.
Workspace.technicalFileView: Technical file view with path, commit, and SHA for precise repository work.
Workspace.adjustFilters: Adjust the search term or status filter to see boards again.
Workspace.sessionLoadFailed: This session could not be loaded.
Workspace.sessionSyncFailed: The current session state could not be synchronized.
Workspace.savingSession: Saving the current session state to GitHub.
Workspace.sessionSaveFailed: The session could not be saved.
Workspace.removePersonFailed: The person could not be removed from the session.
Workspace.personRemoved: The person was removed from the session.
Workspace.checkInvite: Check the invitation link or ask the owner for a new one.
Workspace.historyDescription: All recorded events in this live session, newest first.
Workspace.viewerDescription: View the board and its current state without making changes.
Workspace.collaboratorDescription: Work on the board together; the owner saves the final state to GitHub.
